mechanics.excerpt: Many merce nary commands offer such apprenticeships, while more affluent families hire private tutors train their children _ Tne course 0f study long: often starting at the age of twelve or thirteen and continuing for six or more years. The apprenticeship method uses hands on approach to training and produces pilot who knows his or ner machine inside ad out. Those who complete these apprenticeships usually enter service with mercenary unit, though every House military will take apprenticed pilots and MechWarriors.
